title: Implement Visual Regression Testing
description: Implement visual regression testing using pixel-perfect or DOM-based comparison tools (e.g., Applitools, Percy). Detect UI regressions that are challenging to identify with traditional assertion-based testing.
objectives: Implement visual regression testing using pixel-perfect or DOM-based comparison tools (e.g., Applitools, Percy).
Detect UI regressions that are challenging to identify with traditional assertion-based testing.
